feed.title: Farrim's blog
feed.subtitle: A hackers interested in information technology and cybersecurity.

entry.title: HTB Blue - writeup
entry.summary: HTB/Blue Blue machine is probably one of the easiest Windows machines on HackTheBox. Potential vulnerability is already hidden in machine name ;). But first thing first, let’s do an enumeration with nmap: $ sudo nmap -sS -sV -sC -Pn -O -A -p1-20000 -T5 10.10.10.40 [sudo] password for kali: Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-03-06 09:12 EST Warning: 10.10.10.40 giving up on port b...

entry.title: Testing testing...
entry.summary: Hello World First post from the new blog! :smile:
